Overrides.Override: 15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Svalinn Girded Tower Shield Armour: 520 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.9083 Ward: 144 WardBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: 1d911f933fd12302e5d4e3b2c3ab74d4533be294eebbcafd526d4d9b91c298b8 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-W-W LevelReq: 51 Implicits: 1 +16 to maximum Life 13% Chance to Block Spell Damage +120 to Ward -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage -10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage Chance to Block is Lucky Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
